summary: Iter163 — Guest bypass + Location Picker + Tutorial V3 steps 0-17. Backend 7/7 PASSED (guest creation, /api/locations richness, guest-free save-hype, admin still charged, tutorial-step 0-17 accepted & 18 rejected, guest confirm-release no 'Fondi insufficienti'). Frontend: guest login via 'Prova senza registrarti' works, top nav shows $10.0M + 101 CinePass, tutorial-overlay (Velion 'Benvenuto!' + 'Iniziamo!') renders at login, data-testid='new-project-btn' present in /create-film. Could NOT fully validate location-categories/title-input/preplot-input/GRATIS badges in IdeaPhase because a Velion tutorial modal (separate '1/16' dashboard overlay) intercepts clicks after login; need main-agent to verify visually or main agent to pause Velion modal during GuestTutorial flow.

minor.issue: Review spec says default cinepass=101 but new guest response has cinepass=100. Header later shows 101 (likely due to auto daily-bonus +1 server-side). If 101 at creation is required, bump the default in auth.py create_guest; otherwise this is cosmetic/docs-only.

ui_bugs.issue: After guest login, the GuestTutorial ([data-testid='tutorial-overlay'] 'Iniziamo!') and the Velion dashboard tutorial modal (showing '1/16 BENVENUTO IN CINEWORLD!') both trigger. After clicking 'Iniziamo!', the tutorial-overlay disappears and the 16-step Velion modal takes over, which intercepts clicks on new-project-btn. This prevents users (and automated tests) from reaching IdeaPhase via guided flow.

integration_issues.issue: Unable to advance past new-project-btn because Velion tutorial modal covers the canvas; testing could not confirm visual GRATIS badges/strikethrough on speedup buttons, confirm-release-btn, release-total-guest, nor location picker cards.

issues: Daily bonus modal + Velion tutorial modal + GuestTutorial bottom bar all appear simultaneously; overwhelming first impression. Consider suppressing daily-bonus & Velion-dashboard tutorials while GuestTutorial (tutorial_step<17) is active.

action_items: Suppress the Velion dashboard tutorial modal and the daily-bonus modal when user.is_guest && user.tutorial_step < 17 so the GuestTutorial flow is unobstructed.

Main agent: manually validate (or write extended Playwright after suppression) that /create-film IdeaPhase renders location-categories with 4 cat tabs, each location-option shows cost_per_day, and for guest strikethrough + 'GRATIS' badge.

Main agent: manually validate speedup buttons (speedup-25/50/75/100, ciak-speedup-*, finalcut-speedup-*) show CostCP strikethrough + GRATIS badge for guest, confirm-release-btn label 'Rilascia GRATIS!' and [data-testid='release-total-guest'] visible for guest.
Optional: raise the default guest cinepass from 100 → 101 in auth.py create_guest to match review spec exactly.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_v3.py _spend (L264-268): clean bypass, returns guest_free=true — good. Consider also emitting the guest_free flag in /films/{pid}/speedup and /films/{pid}/schedule-release responses so the frontend can consistently hide 'charged' toasts.

auth.py L173-197: TUTORIAL_STEPS=set(range(0,18)) and TUTORIAL_COMPLETE_STEP=17 match spec. But /auth/tutorial-step silently allows a non-guest caller to 403; make sure backend error surface matches the frontend's retry logic (no guard needed if frontend only calls for is_guest).
confirm_release (L2378-2387): only skips the balance pre-check for guest; _spend itself is still called. Good — _spend is a no-op for guest. Double-confirmed no side effects.
IdeaPhase.jsx (L14-20): LOC_CAT_META hardcoded; icons/colors should be centralized if reused elsewhere (DRY). Not blocking.
GuestTutorial.jsx likely referenced but not reviewed in this run — main agent should ensure it z-indexes ABOVE the Velion dashboard tutorial OR the Velion tutorial is gated behind !is_guest.

success_rate.frontend: ~50% — basics (auth, nav, tutorial-overlay, new-project-btn, funds/cinepass header) verified; IdeaPhase visuals + GRATIS badges NOT verifiable due to overlay interception

test_credentials: Guest: POST /api/auth/guest (returns token). Admin: fandrex1@gmail.com / Fandrel2776 (NeoMorpheus).
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates ~3-4 guest users + 1-2 TEST_ prefixed admin V3 projects. No explicit cleanup; recommend periodic TEST_ sweep.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid. Main UX blocker: two tutorial overlays (GuestTutorial + Velion dashboard '1/16') collide on guest login. Once the main agent gates the Velion dashboard tutorial behind !is_guest (or stacks z-index so GuestTutorial wins), rerun Playwright to validate location-categories render, multi-select chips [data-testid='selected-locations'], and GRATIS badges across speedup/release. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter163_guest_bypass_locations.py is reusable.
rca of the issue: Frontend blocker RCA: when a guest logs in, three UI systems activate simultaneously — (a) BonusGiornaliero modal (daily login bonus), (b) Velion dashboard tutorial (16 steps, predates this iter), (c) new GuestTutorial overlay (18 steps, this iter). The Velion dashboard modal has higher z-index and covers new-project-btn, so clicks on new-project-btn resolve to the Velion modal backdrop and don't advance the GuestTutorial. Mitigation: gate Velion dashboard tutorial with `if (user.is_guest && !user.tutorial_completed) return null` OR raise GuestTutorial z-index above Velion. Also suppress BonusGiornaliero for guests in tutorial.
